Provenance.drafts: 8-20 candidates generated locally via ComfyUI MCP across escalation rounds; curated hard per art/pipeline/README.md
Provenance.paintoverNote: round 3 escalation (12 candidates total across 3 rounds); c3 -- feral quadruped stance, bared teeth clearly visible, no clothing/props/pedestal (rounds 1-2 drew anthropomorphized rat-people in coats/cloaks holding staves, or a display-pedestal pose -- round 3 negative-prompt hardening against clothing/bipedal/pedestal fixed it)
